buttons.primary: bg-[#005F73] text-white hover:bg-[#0A9396] transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#005F73] text-[#005F73] hover:bg-[#005F73] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#E05D36] text-white hover:bg-[#C94D29] transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium

cards.destination: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow
cards.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-2xl

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm

images.description: Aerial view of a sandy beach and turquoise ocean waves
images.alt_text: Pemandangan udara pantai dan laut Sulawesi

images.description: Beautiful sunset silhouette of the 99 Domes Mosque with reflection on the water in Makassar
images.alt_text: Masjid 99 Kubah Makassar saat matahari terbenam

images.description: Professional diver exploring colorful coral reefs
images.alt_text: Penyelaman terumbu karang di Sulawesi Selatan

images.description: A tropical resort featuring a modern building and palm trees
images.alt_text: Resor tropis dan penginapan di Sulawesi

images.description: An island in the middle of the ocean
Colorful coral reef underwater with fish

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Full height (min-h-[80vh]) immersive section. Background image of tropical beach.
sections.layout: Flex column, centered content or left-aligned depending on image focal point. Add gradient overlay bg-black/40 to ensure text readability.
elements: Subheadline: 'Pesan tur, penyelaman, dan penginapan eksklusif di Makassar, Spermonde, dan Taka Bonerate.'
Search/CTA Bar: Glassmorphism bar with destination dropdown, date, and primary CTA button 'Cari Petualangan'

sections.name: Destinasi Unggulan (Featured Destinations)
sections.description: Bento Grid layout displaying the top 3 regions.
sections.layout: Tetris Grid. 1 large card (Makassar) col-span-12 md:col-span-8 row-span-2. 2 smaller cards (Spermonde, Taka Bonerate).
elements: Destination Cards with background images, gradient overlay, and bottom-aligned text.

sections.name: Kategori Aktivitas (Activities)
sections.description: Horizontal scroll or 4-column grid for Tour, Diving, Snorkeling, Hotel.
elements: Icons or small images for each category.
Minimalist card design with subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1).

sections.name: Cara Kerja (How It Works)
sections.layout: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or flex column with connecting lines.
elements: Steps: 1. Pilih Destinasi, 2. Pesan Aktivitas & Penginapan, 3. Nikmati Liburan.
Use generous padding (p-12) and large elegant numerals (font-serif text-6xl text-accent-coral/20).

sections.name: Testimoni (Testimonials)
sections.layout: Slow moving carousel of text reviews.
elements: Text: Pale background (#F0EBE1), dark text. Very slow drift.

sections.name: Operator CTA (Partners)
sections.description: Section calling for local businesses to join.
sections.layout: Dark background (#0B1D2E) block for high contrast.

sections.name: Footer & Newsletter
sections.layout: Grid layout. Massive 'BahariTrip' logo/text at the bottom.
elements: Newsletter input: Shadcn input styled with rounded edges.
Links: Tentang Kami, Destinasi, Syarat & Ketentuan.

technical_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) for elegant travel vibe.
technical_instructions.animations: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fades. Use Lenis for smooth scrolling.
technical_instructions.accessibility: Ensure all text over images has sufficient contrast or text-shadow. Use data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='cta-search-button').
technical_instructions.html_tags: Prefer native HTML elements with Tailwind classes for layout to maintain flexibility, use Shadcn for complex interactive components like DatePicker or Select.
technical_instructions.shadcn_customization: Roundness: rounded-2xl. Strip default borders on cards if using solid backgrounds. Avoid generic card components for the Bento Grid.
